name: Meta Lead Ad → Enrichment

parameters.functionCode:
console.log('Meta lead without email — skipping enrichment');
return [$input.first()];

notes:
Receives Meta/Facebook lead ad form submissions and forwards to Master Dashboard enrichment pipeline.

Setup:
1. In Meta Business Suite → Leads Center → CRM Setup → Webhooks
2. Point webhook to: {N8N_BASE_URL}/webhook/meta-lead-webhook
3. Or use Meta's Conversions API with N8N HTTP trigger
4. Map company_id based on ad account or form name (default: Grand Park Capital = 1)
